nasb.text: In those days Hezekiah became mortally ill; and he prayed to the Lord, and the Lord spoke to him and gave him a sign.

esv.text: In those days Hezekiah became sick and was at the point of death, and he prayed to the Lord, and he answered him and gave him a sign.

cnv.text: 那時，希西家患病垂危，就禱告耶和華；耶和華應允了他，又賜他一個徵兆。

ccb.text: 那时，希西迦病危，他向耶和华祈求。耶和华应允了他，赐给他一个征兆。
